scripts.generate:api:application-server:specs: cd server && sh -c 'if command -v docker >/dev/null 2>&1 && docker info >/dev/null 2>&1; then ./mvnw verify -DskipTests=true -Dapp.profiles=specs; else SPRING_DOCKER_COMPOSE_ENABLED=false ./mvnw verify -DskipTests=true -Dapp.profiles=specs; fi'
scripts.generate:api:application-server:client: pnpm run generate:api:application-server:clean && pnpm --filter webapp run openapi-ts
scripts.generate:api:application-server: pnpm run generate:api:application-server:specs && pnpm run generate:api:application-server:client
scripts.format:java: node --import tsx scripts/run-quiet.ts prettier --write "server/src/**/*.java" --config-precedence prefer-file --config server/.prettierrc.yaml --ignore-path server/.prettierignore
scripts.format:java:check: node --import tsx scripts/run-quiet.ts prettier --check "server/src/**/*.java" --config-precedence prefer-file --config server/.prettierrc.yaml --ignore-path server/.prettierignore
scripts.lint:java:report: node --import tsx scripts/run-mvnw.ts pmd:pmd && echo 'Report: server/target/site/pmd.html'
scripts.check:server: pnpm run format:server:check && pnpm run lint:server
scripts.format: pnpm run format:server && pnpm run format:client
scripts.format:check: pnpm run format:server:check && pnpm run format:client:check
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:webapp && pnpm run typecheck:scripts
scripts.dev:reset: cd server && docker compose down -v && node -e "import('node:fs/promises').then(fs => fs.rm('postgres-data', {recursive: true, force: true}))" && docker compose up -d --wait

pnpm.//: overrides + peerDependencyRules live in pnpm-workspace.yaml — pnpm 11's documented location.
